g.text: Queue order is preserved for non-emergency flights after re-queuing.
Emergency flights are automatically allocated the next available slot without manual confirmation.
Emergency flights are flagged and prioritized above all others.
Slots are allocated sequentially; next available slot is assigned to emergency.
EmergencyRequestDTO(flightId: String, detectionTime: DateTime, actorId: String)
QueueStatusDTO(flights: List<FlightDTO>, emergencyCount: Integer, nextAvailableSlot: SlotDTO)
FlightDTO(id: String, type: FlightType, slotTime: DateTime)
SlotDTO(id: String, time: DateTime, status: SlotStatus)
